title: Advanced Web Development Project Templates
description: This repository provides a robust set of project templates designed to streamline the planning, architecture, and development phases of any web project. By combining human-readable Markdown with machine-readable JSON, these templates enable better communication, enforce best practices, and pave the way for powerful automation.

philosophyAndKeyFeatures.title: Philosophy & Key Features
philosophyAndKeyFeatures.introduction: Our template system is built upon the principle of "Planning as Code", ensuring clarity, consistency, and automation readiness:

points.heading: Dual-Format Approach
points.content: Each core template exists in two formats: .md (Markdown) for human collaboration, easy reading, and rich documentation; and .json for machine processing, enabling automation scripts and programmatic access to project details.

points.heading: Best Practices Integrated
points.content: Incorporates modern software development methodologies: Mermaid.js Diagrams, Architectural Decision Records (ADRs), User Stories & Gherkin Criteria, Metadata & Labels.

points.heading: Actionable Planning
points.content: Transforms static documents into dynamic tools that drive development.

templates.name: product-overview.md / product-overview.json
templates.purpose: Defines the product vision, core user epics & stories, acceptance criteria, and a phased development roadmap.
templates.machineValue: Fuels automated test generation, task creation in project management tools, and initial UI component scaffolding.

templates.name: plan.md / plan.json
templates.purpose: Details the technical architecture, including the main tech stack, a Mermaid ER diagram, structured API endpoint definitions, and references to Architectural Decision Records.
templates.machineValue: Drives database migration generation, API routing, basic model scaffolding, and environment configuration.

templates.name: resume.md / resume.json
templates.purpose: Serves as the Project Kick-off Checklist and Automation Hub. It validates planning completion and provides commands for executing automation scripts.
templates.machineValue: Orchestrates the automated setup and initialization of the project, ensuring all preconditions are met.

templates.name: docs/adr/adr-template.md
templates.purpose: A template for documenting significant architectural decisions, including context, the decision itself, consequences, and affected project scope.
templates.machineValue: Provides structured rationale that can be used by advanced linters or architectural compliance tools.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
steps: Clone this repository: Get the template files onto your local machine.
Duplicate for a New Project: Copy the entire `templates` directory (or specific files) to your new project folder.
Fill in the `.md` Templates: Start by defining your project in `product-overview.md` and `plan.md`. Use the placeholders `[ ]` to guide your input.
Review `resume.md`: This checklist will guide you through validating your planning and preparing for automation.
(Optional) Implement Automation Scripts: Develop custom scripts (e.g., `npm run generate:scaffold`) that read the `.json` versions of your filled templates to automate repetitive coding tasks.

benefits.title: Benefits for Developers
points: Reduce Ambiguity: Clear, structured planning minimizes misunderstandings.
Improve Planning Quality: Enforces a systematic approach to project definition.
Accelerate Development: Automate repetitive setup tasks, freeing up time for core logic.
Ensure Consistency: Maintain uniform project structures and coding standards.
Preserve Knowledge: Document decisions and context for long-term project health.
